An Asian nation has never previously beaten England in 10 attempts  – this is England’s first game against an Asian team since a 6-2 win over IR Iran in November 2022 at the FIFA World Cup.

beIN SPORTS XTRA 3.original_title: Austria vs Korea Republic - International Friendly - 2026
beIN SPORTS XTRA 3.title: Austria vs Korea Republic - International Friendly - 2026
beIN SPORTS XTRA 3.desc: Austria and South Korea are meeting for the first time in an international match. South Korea's squad includes Tae-Seok Lee, a familiar player who is a regular for FK Austria Wien. Austria are unbeaten in their last 12 home matches, equalling their national record, previously achieved between 1971 and 1975 and 1922 and 1925. The ÖFB team could now set a new record, 124 years after their very first match in Vienna.
